notes: Run details and chat feel much better: paged history, smoother streaming text, better scroll anchoring, and clearer subagent activity during long sessions.
Board and task workflows are more reliable: blocker details appear before starting work, warning states are clearer, and board/task status updates handle stale state more cleanly.
Run setup is more flexible: new run worktrees can use a selected source branch, and run cards now show clearer, more human-friendly identifiers.
Project setup is easier: local repository paths now support fuzzy search, and project defaults, settings autosave, and repository guidance are more polished.
The app shell is more polished overall: the About modal was refreshed, sidebar behavior was improved, and supported Linux installs can now surface package update notices.

commands.deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install --only-upgrade orkestraos
